## [00:00 - 03:02]

Hey guys, in this video I want to talk about Bot Fields and Bot Fields look a little bit like custom fields but they are more clever. Now Bot Fields are dynamic fields you give the value to. Now for example you can use Bot Fields to create scarcity in your flows. For example you can set a Bot Fields that says okay for this webinar we only have 50 seats available or you can set a Bot Fields if you want to decrease the number of products available. For example let's say you're selling digital products in Messenger and you only have I don't know maybe 100 specific digital products available for an early bird price. Now you can set your Bot Fields to 100 available and every time a purchase happens you can set it to reduce the number of actual digital products or products in general available. You can also set Bot Fields to pre-populate and this is a big one you can set those Bot Fields to pre-populate specific fields in templates. So for example if you create a template for a local lead gen and you want to use that template for your clients. Now in that look for example just going to take the local lead gen for example and in that template you have values that all the people are going to use the template will have those values but the will have those Bot Fields but the values will be different like what's the phone number of the business what's the address of the business what's the email address of the business what's the what's the name of the business etc all that stuff that can all be populated in Bot Fields and the only thing you then need to do in the template example is to update the values for those Bot Fields in your dashboard which means you're gonna in the template example you got import a template to clients account it will import the Bot Fields and you and the Bot Fields values are used in the flow and we're gonna we're gonna show you exactly how that works but when that happens the only thing you then need to do is you need to change the value from the Bot Fields in the settings and magic throughout the flow all the values are updated this is a major time saver so what I'm going to do guys I'm gonna share my screen with you and I'm going to show you a couple examples on how I use Bot Fields let me go in here let me go to the settings here now you will find your Bot Fields in the custom field section in your MediChat dashboard so you go to settings you go to Bot setting sorry you go to custom fields go Bot settings there you go to custom fields and then you will
